# mailgun_routes (Data Source)

Lists all Mailgun routes in your account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all routes
data "mailgun_routes" "all" {}

output "route_expressions" {
  value = [for r in data.mailgun_routes.all.routes : r.expression]
}

# List routes with a limit
data "mailgun_routes" "limited" {
  limit = 10
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of routes to return. Defaults to 100.

### Read-Only

- `routes` (Attributes List) List of routes. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--routes))
- `total_count` (Number) Total number of routes returned.

<a id="nestedatt--routes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `routes`

Read-Only:

- `actions` (List of String) List of actions to execute when the expression matches.
- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the route was created.
- `description` (String) Human-readable description of the route.
- `expression` (String) The filter expression for the route.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the route.
- `priority` (Number) Route priority. Lower numbers have higher priority.
